name: Karix
description: Karix — India-focused A2P SMS and messaging API platform for enterprise bulk messaging and notifications.

seo.title: Karix — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: Karix: Karix — India-focused A2P SMS and messaging API platform for enterprise bulk messaging and notifications.

when_to_use: India A2P SMS for enterprise bulk notification delivery
Transactional OTP SMS for banking and fintech apps
Promotional SMS campaigns for Indian e-commerce brands
DLT-compliant messaging for Indian regulatory requirements
High-volume SMS routing for telecom operator clients

pros: Strong A2P SMS throughput in India
Enterprise bulk messaging with direct carrier routes
Decent reliability for OTP and notification traffic
cons: Narrow focus — mostly SMS, less omnichannel
Developer experience lags modern CPaaS peers
Branding tangled across Karix, Tanla, Tanla Karix
Limited appeal outside India and nearby markets
review.verdict: Reliable Indian A2P SMS pipe for enterprises — unexciting DX, but gets OTPs through.
review.best_for: Indian enterprises sending large-volume OTP and notification SMS
review.not_for: Teams wanting WhatsApp, RCS, voice and SMS in one modern developer stack

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage/metered billing scales up and down.
